events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`: the low, matched compression readings on two adjacent cylinders combined with correlated leak-down (cross-cylinder air leakage) points to a failed head gasket between that cylinder pair — a classic fault pattern from gauge numbers alone. Marked as `fail`/`high` risk since it's an in-service asset with active mechanical failure risk (overheating, coolant/oil contamination), with recommended teardown/inspection/replacement steps and retest before returning to service.
